title: dioscorea cissophylla
intro: Dioscorea cissophylla, also known as the mountain yam, is a type of plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea cissophylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause. Dioscorea cissophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried roots and powdered extracts.
